text: "Tomorrow is the new moon"... The neomenia, or first day of the moon, kept according to the law, as a festival; and therefore Saul feasted on that day: and expected the attendance of his family.

"May he take away Jonathan"... It is a curse upon himself, if he should not be faithful to his promise.—Ibid. Require it. That is, 
revenge it upon David’s enemies, and upon me, if I should fail of my word given to him.
"The son of death"... That is, one that deserveth death, and shall surely be put to death.
